Web search results for query: "nexusmods curseforge mod browser card grid view toggle UX design pattern"

Links: [{"title":"An Update on the Mod Browsing Overhaul at Nexus mods and community","url":"https://www.nexusmods.com/news/15239"},{"title":"Grid - Minecraft Mods - CurseForge","url":"https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/grid"},{"title":"custom:grid-layout not working in browser_mod.popup #116","url":"https://github.com/thomasloven/lovelace-layout-card/issues/116"},{"title":"Modding the new design of nexusmods.com - General Chat - Nexus Mods Forums","url":"https://forums.nexusmods.com/topic/13511343-modding-the-new-design-of-nexusmodscom/"},{"title":"Nexus Layer - Minecraft Mods - CurseForge","url":"https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/nexus-layer"},{"title":"PatternFly • Card view","url":"https://www.patternfly.org/patterns/card-view/design-guidelines/"},{"title":"Tiles or grid feature to view mods and library (Curseforge feature) · Issue #2850 · modrinth/code","url":"https://github.com/modrinth/code/issues/2850"},{"title":"The Nexus Pixelmon [FORGE] - Minecraft Modpacks - CurseForge","url":"https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/the-nexus-pixelmon"},{"title":"The Nexus [FORGE] - Minecraft Modpacks - CurseForge","url":"https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/the-nexus-forge"}]

Based on the search results, here's what I found regarding mod browser UI and the card/grid view toggle pattern:

## Nexus Mods Implementation

Nexus Mods is exploring display options such as grid and list views for their mod browsing interface. The grid and list view was something many users preferred, offering more content visibility on the page. This addresses a key UX consideration where the new design improves the hierarchy of content, making it easier to browse across different sections on a page while standardising elements of the layout across different pages.

## CurseForge User Preference

Users have consistently requested view toggle functionality similar to CurseForge. CurseForge offers a configuration switch between tiles and list UI format, which users appreciate for browsing mods and modpacks, as this provides better visual density and aesthetics.

## General UX Design Pattern

From a broader UX perspective, a card view is a grid of cards in a gallery to facilitate browsing, and card views are typically used to present data set summaries, allowing users to drill down into any card to see more detailed content. Additionally, a card view that toggles into a table or list view is a recognized design pattern when content views need to change based on user preference.

This toggle pattern represents a common solution for balancing visual browsing (card/grid view) with content density (list view), allowing users to choose their preferred interface.
